name: refine-feature
description: Takes one skeleton feature from the backlog store to build-ready through an SME interview — four-risks triage (fast lane / full pass / discovery-brief exit), a behavior-change hypothesis, a quantified success signal, dual-test feature acceptance criteria, critical-few NFRs, and shallow story-set curation (add/split/park/repair + first slice). Writes back to the backlog store in place (optional Miro Card mirror). Tracker-agnostic, no API required.
